dict.string: IsletIQ uses speech recognition to let you talk to your diabetes assistant.
IsletIQ needs microphone access for voice input to the agent.

IsletIQ reads your glucose, insulin, meals, sleep, heart rate, HRV, blood pressure, body temperature, and blood oxygen from Apple Health to show your daily health dashboard, surface trends, and provide personalized diabetes insights you can review with your healthcare provider.
IsletIQ writes the meals, carb counts, glucose readings, and insulin doses you log so your full diabetes history lives in Apple Health alongside data from your CGM, pump, and other apps.
IsletIQ uses the camera to photograph food and supplies for the AI agent.
IsletIQ connects to your local AI service for diabetes management agents.
